text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, I accompany Admire Vega and Haru Urara
to a traditional inn. Needless to say, the reason
being...

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
All right, crew! Let's run through the locations for
the poster photo shoot tomorrow, shall we?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Okay! ♪ I'm so excited! ♪

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
First off, we'll take a photo here at the entrance.
After that, we'll do some solo shots of you two
separately.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
For Urara, I'm thinking of taking photos of you in
the inn's main attraction, the Sakura Lounge,
while you partake in our cherry blossom-themed
cuisine.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Cherry blossom-themed? I wonder what that means! Sounds fun though! ♪

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
As for Ayabe, I'm thinking it'd be great if you'd
pose in another attraction of the inn, the Crimson
Courtyard. I'd love to capture you beautifully
surrounded in that world of autumn hues.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
And I'm positive the red accents of the kimono
we've prepared will blend perfectly with the
autumn leaves! Man, I can't wait for tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I'll do what I can...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thus, the day of the photo shoot begins,
but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Nooo, it's raining!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
It's a shame, but there's no changing the weather.
Ayabe, let's scrap our previous plan and move the
shoot indoors instead.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why? I'm fine getting a little wet.

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
No. What if you catch a cold? As your fan, I
couldn't possibly be responsible for disrupting
your race schedule. Don't worry! I've thought of
other locations.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Like I said—why?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
To begin with, conditions are never perfect in a
race—not the track, nor the weather... not even
my own body.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Yet, still, I run. Because none of those are valid
reasons not to. After all...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Running is the decision I made. The same goes for this photo shoot. Plus...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Weren't you the one praising how virtuous it is
that I never go back on my word?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh right! The owner did say something like that! I
remember, because it sounded super cool!

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Yeah, you're right. What was I thinking?

text_block_list.name: Inn Owner
text_block_list.text:
Then, please forget what I said about changing
our plans. If you are willing, shall we continue the
photo shoot?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Just let me know when you're ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And thus, even amid a downpour, the photo
shoot for the posters featuring Admire Vega
comes to a successful end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later in the central plaza, I come
across Admire Vega and Haru Urara surrounded
by a large group of students.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Urara, I saw your poster in front of the station!
You were absolutely adorable!
choice_data_list: Looks like someone's the center of attention.
Looks like someone's the center of attention.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee, you're making me blush!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Ayabe, I wanna hear your story too! Your pictures
were so awesome! The one with you wistfully
standing in the rain gave me goosebumps!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing really to tell. I just stood there
and had my photo taken.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Wait, was it actually raining?! I thought you had a
race later that same day...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
In defense of the inn, I wasn't troubled in any
way. Besides, they provided me with a towel and
heater afterwards.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I also... got to use their hot spring.
choice_data_list: I wish I'd taken a dip in the hot spring myself.
I wish I'd taken a dip in the hot spring myself.

You're surprisingly cut out to be a model, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I also... got to use their hot spring.
choice_data_list: I wish I'd taken a dip in the hot spring myself.
I wish I'd taken a dip in the hot spring myself.

You're surprisingly cut out to be a model, don't
you think?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's a little late to be saying that...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but the hot spring was so relaxing!
Wouldn't you wanna go again, Ayabe?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...If the opportunity presents itself.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
If?! Awww, I wanted you to teach me about the
constellations again.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We could see the stars from the open-air
bath, so Ayabe taught me loads about
constellations! ♪ She had so much to say about
them!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The constellations I know of just happened to be
in view, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: The photographer was skilled, that's all.

Really? If that's all it takes for a quality photo,
then everyone would be a model. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I saw your poster! ♪ It really, like, highlights your
strong points, you know?

Haaah ha ha ha! Indubitably so! You looked
gorgeous!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Gorgeous to the extent that even I, beauty
incarnate, could not overlook you!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I have heard your declaration of war, and I shall
respond in kind!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow! ♪ A declaration of war?! Yeah, totally! I
won't back down either, then! I'm feeling a little
pumped! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Now that we are in accord, shall we go
settle this photo shoot battle?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm in! ♪ Should we all go to the hot spring
together?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Hey, when did I say I was in on this?! Can you all
stop dragging me into things already?!
